items.title: Bernardo Silva confirms Man City summer exit
items.summary: Bernardo Silva has announced he will leave Manchester City this summer.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: French Open increases total purse to $72.1 million
items.summary: The prize money for the French Open has increased by about 10% for an overall pot of 61.7 million euros ($72.1 million), organizers said.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
